name: openreel-studio
description: Optionally let Codex directly operate OpenReel Studio projects, canvas nodes, media, and runs without replacing OpenReel's default agent.

interface.shortDescription: Optionally control the OpenReel canvas with Codex.
interface.longDescription: An opt-in connection for a running OpenReel desktop, source, Docker, or remote installation. Common project, node, edge, run, and upload operations are directly available; complex or uncommon canvas schemas are discovered only when needed. Installing the plugin does not replace or disable OpenReel's default chat agent.
defaultPrompt: 连接本机 OpenReel，列出项目并概览当前画布。
在 OpenReel 当前项目中直接搭建图片到视频的节点流程。
检查 OpenReel 当前画布的失败节点，修正后继续运行。
